payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Small dark-brown carved wooden side table with ornate legs and a lower shelf holding a folded patterned cloth; front and top surfaces are visible while the right edge is slightly cropped, finish appears glossy with small items on the tabletop; photographed fairly close to the camera (≈1.2 m).
